features.name: conditional force with impure function condition
features.description: Code should include a force statement inside a conditional if-block where the condition depends on an impure function call like $random

features.name: multiple force statements targeting same wire
features.description: Code should include two force statements that both target the same wire signal but with different RHS values

features.name: force with release on wire
features.description: Code should include a force statement on a wire followed by a release statement on the same wire

features.name: force with runtime conditional branch selection
features.description: Code should include multiple conditional force statements where only one branch executes at runtime based on a runtime value
